name: TragicCommonsAttestation
description: Attests an agent's commons behavior in the Tragedy of the Commons game. Magnitude encodes how far above or below sustainable extraction the agent operated.

fields.name: preserved
fields.description: true=operated at or below sustainable threshold

fields.name: extractionRatio
fields.description: % relative to sustainable threshold: negative=under-extracted, positive=over-extracted. Range: -100 to +200.

fields.name: roundSupply
fields.description: Total pool supply at round start (context)

magnitudeScaling.description: Magnitude scales with how far from threshold. Capped at 2× — extreme depletion doesn't compound indefinitely.

asymmetry.note: Commons depletion carries asymmetric weight on stewardship dimension.

notes: Stewardship-dominant. Game 4 of Season 1. Under-extraction is also noted — sacrificing personal gain for commons health is a positive signal.
